response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified three distinct performance segments. 2. Identified performers: Hakui Koyori (all segments), Nekomata Okayu (segment 1), Tsunomaki Watame (segment 3). 3. Resolved song metadata from on-screen text: 'エアーマンが倒せない' (Team Nekokan), 'ロボのテーマ' (Yasunori Mitsuda), 'Melodies Of Life' (Nobuo Uematsu). 4. Used search tool to find official lyrics for 'Airman ga Taosenai' and 'Melodies of Life'. 5. Determined 'Robo's Theme' segment is instrumental and contains no vocals. 6. Constructed the final JSON response.
response.global_summary: A video showcasing three performances by VTubers Hakui Koyori, Nekomata Okayu, and Tsunomaki Watame during Hakui Koyori's birthday live event. The performances include 'Airman ga Taosenai' by Team Nekokan, 'Robo's Theme' by Yasunori Mitsuda (instrumental), and 'Melodies of Life' by Nobuo Uematsu.

scenes.description: Hakui Koyori and Nekomata Okayu perform 'Airman ga Taosenai'.
scenes.song_title: エアーマンが倒せない
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
気がついたら同じ面ばかりプレイ
そしていつも同じ場所で死ぬ
諦めずに消える足場に挑戦するけど、
すぐに下に落ちるよ
アイテム2号があれば
楽に向こうの岸まで着くけど
何回やっても 何回やっても
エアーマンが倒せないよ
あの竜巻何回やっても避けれない
うしろに回って撃ち続けても
いずれは風に飛ばされる
タイム連打も試してみたけど
竜巻相手じゃ意味が無い!
だから次は絶対勝つために
僕はE缶だけは最後までとっておく...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
When I realized it, I was playing the same stage again,
And always dying in the same spot.
I try challenging the disappearing platform without giving up,
But I fall right down.
If I had Item 2, I could reach the other side easily,
But no matter how many times I try, no matter how many times I try,
I can't defeat Airman.
That tornado, I can't avoid it no matter how many times I try.
Even if I go behind him and keep shooting,
I'll eventually get blown away by the wind.
I tried rapid-firing too,
But it's meaningless against the tornado!
So, to win for sure next time,
I'll save my E-Can until the very end.
... (Full lyrics follow the same pattern)

scenes.description: Hakui Koyori dances to an instrumental EDM remix of 'Robo's Theme'.
Hakui Koyori and Tsunomaki Watame perform 'Melodies of Life'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
果てしなく彷徨っていた
手がかりもなく探し続けた
あなたがくれた思い出を
心を癒す歌にして
約束もすることもなく
交わす言葉も決めたリもせず
抱きしめ、そして確かめた
日々は二度と帰らぬ...
...
(Full lyrics provided in search result)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Alone for a while, I've been searching through the dark,
For traces of the love you left inside my lonely heart,
To weave by picking up the pieces that remain,
Melodies of Life, love's lost refrain.
...
(Full lyrics provided in search result)
